differential_diagnoses: Severe viral hepatitis (e.g., Hepatitis A or E)
Human granulocytic anaplasmosis with multi-organ involvement
next_steps: Send serum and urine for Leptospira PCR and Leptospirosis serology (MAT or IgM ELISA)
Perform peripheral blood smear to evaluate for Babesia and schistocytes
Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) to assess for diffuse alveolar hemorrhage
Order viral hepatitis panel (HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV) and acetaminophen level
Obtain peripheral blood smear and PCR for Babesia microti
Continue intensive supportive care including lung-protective ventilation and renal replacement therapy as needed
Monitor serial lactate, inflammatory markers (ferritin), and coagulation profile
